summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a high‑energy 1982 show highlighted by a stellar West L.A. Fadeaway and a punchy Truckin' second set.
review: The recording is a clean soundboard source that reproduces the festive atmosphere of the night, while the performance shines with Jerry’s standout vocals on West L.A. Fadeaway and a powerful second‑set surge anchored by Truckin'. A lone blemish is the poorly received Far From Me, but overall the show is regarded as a classic early‑80s Dead concert.

ai_rating.rationale: Average reviewer rating is 4.6/5, most comments praise both the musical performance and the soundboard quality; only one song receives notable criticism.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the capture as "nice" and "great", noting clear, crisp audio that conveys the fun of the night.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A solid, if not exceptional, first set followed by a powerful second set that many reviewers singled out as a highlight.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His vocal on West L.A. Fadeaway is praised as possibly the best ever recorded.
band_member_comments.Keys: Mixed feelings about Brent Mydland: some praise his contributions after settling in, while one reviewer thinks his singing should have been cut earlier.
